case_title: JORGE ARMANDO SANCHEZ MARTINEZ VS. EUNICE DELFIN VILLAVERT-EGIPTO et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, JORGE ARMANDO SANCHEZ AS TO DEFENDANT VILLAVERT-EGIPTO, EUNICE DELFIN VILLAVERT, VIRGILIO DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-08-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-04-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-23-2013
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-08-2013 CONTINUED TO JUN-19-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-30-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-19-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-30-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
